days.title: RACE DAY — Wy'East Trailfest 50M
days.content:
**Race Day — August 15, 2026**

Wy'East Trailfest 50M (~51.8 miles, ~7,274 ft)

This is what the last 22 weeks were for. Trust the training. Fuel early and often — 70–80g carbs/hr from mile 1. Hike the steep stuff without shame. Run the flats and downhills with confidence.

You've been here before. Finish it.

days.title: Day Off
days.content: Rest. Eat. Sleep. You just ran 50 miles.

weeks.target: 0 running miles — walk and move only
weeks.content: First week after the race. The goal is blood flow, sleep, and food — not fitness. Your cardiovascular system recovers in days; your muscles, tendons, and connective tissue take 3–4 weeks. Walk daily. Eat well. Do not be fooled by how good your legs feel by Thursday — the deep tissue repair is still happening.
